user.title: Set up Brizel Health
user.description: Create the Brizel Health integration entry. Additional source configuration can be added later.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single Brizel Health configuration is supported.

init.title: Manage profiles
init.description: Choose which profile action you want to perform.

add_profile.title: Add profile
add_profile.description: Create a new Brizel Health profile.

data_description.preferred_language: Optional language preference for search quality and future locale-aware features. Leave empty to follow Home Assistant defaults.
data_description.preferred_region: Optional food market preference such as Germany, EU, USA or Global. Leave empty to follow Home Assistant defaults.
data_description.preferred_units: Optional preferred unit system. Leave empty to follow Home Assistant defaults.

edit_profile_select.title: Select profile
edit_profile_select.description: Choose which profile you want to edit.

data_description.display_name: New display name for the profile.
data_description.preferred_language: Optional language preference for search quality and future locale-aware features. Leave empty to follow Home Assistant defaults.
data_description.preferred_region: Optional food market preference such as Germany, EU, USA or Global. Leave empty to follow Home Assistant defaults.
data_description.preferred_units: Optional preferred unit system. Leave empty to follow Home Assistant defaults.

delete_profile_select.title: Select profile
delete_profile_select.description: Choose which profile you want to delete.

data_description.confirm: Enable to delete the selected profile.

edit_body_profile_select.title: Select profile
edit_body_profile_select.description: Choose which profile body data you want to update.

link_ha_user_select.title: Select profile
link_ha_user_select.description: Choose which profile should be linked to a Home Assistant user.

link_ha_user.title: Link Home Assistant user
link_ha_user.description: Choose which Home Assistant user should be linked to {profile_name}. Select Not linked to remove the current link.

data_description.linked_ha_user_id: Used to resolve the active Brizel profile automatically from service calls made by that Home Assistant user.

edit_body_profile.title: Edit body data
edit_body_profile.description: Update body data for {profile_name}. Leave fields empty if they are not known yet.

data_description.age_years: Age in whole years. Needed for the current conservative calorie estimate.
data_description.sex: Used only for the current conservative calorie estimate. Leave empty if unknown.
data_description.height_cm: Body height in centimeters. Needed for the current conservative calorie estimate.
data_description.weight_kg: Body weight in kilograms. Needed for protein and fat targets and for the current calorie estimate.
data_description.activity_level: Self-estimated daily activity level. Used for protein and calorie targets.

configure_food_sources.title: Configure food sources
configure_food_sources.description: Manage external food sources. BLS is a built-in German nutrient database snapshot. Open Food Facts can be used for live product search and import. USDA needs an API key for live requests.

data_description.bls_enabled: Enable the built-in BLS database snapshot for generic foods and German/EU search contexts.
data_description.bls_priority: Lower numbers are selected first when multiple sources are used.
data_description.usda_enabled: Enable live USDA search and import.
data_description.usda_api_key: Required when USDA is enabled. The key is sent with every USDA request.
data_description.usda_priority: Lower numbers are selected first when multiple sources are used.
data_description.open_food_facts_enabled: Enable live Open Food Facts search and import.
data_description.open_food_facts_priority: Lower numbers are selected first when multiple sources are used.

abort.integration_not_loaded: The integration is not loaded yet. Try again after setup has finished.
abort.no_profiles_available: There are currently no profiles to manage.
abort.profile_not_found: The selected profile could not be found anymore.

error.already_exists: A profile with this name already exists.
error.profile_not_found: The selected profile could not be found anymore.
error.confirmation_required: Please confirm the deletion to continue.
error.invalid_height: Enter a valid height in centimeters.
error.invalid_weight: Enter a valid weight in kilograms.
error.invalid_body_profile: The body data could not be saved with the provided values.
error.invalid_preferred_units: Select a supported preferred unit system.
error.ha_user_already_linked: This Home Assistant user is already linked to another profile.
error.usda_api_key_required: Enter a USDA API key when USDA is enabled.
